---
title: "\'Aunt Cecily\'s Music Lessons\'"
---

## \'Aunt Cecily\'s Music Lessons\'
**Date:** 1866-1869
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1866-July 1869)

### Notes

CMY states that these were written by the music teacher at Winnington Hall School, who in 1871 was Elizabeth Flowel or Howel.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
